Pals.name: Lamball
Pals.description: Big Floof - A walk up a hill tends to end with this Pal tumbling back down. This causes it to become dizzy and unable to move, making it easy to capture and kill. As a result, this Pal has tumbled down to the very bottom of the food chain itself.
Pals.partner: Fluffy Shield - When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops wool when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Cattiva
Pals.description: The Cat's Pajamas - At a glance it appears full of confidence, but it is in fact weak and cowardly. Being toyed with by a Cattiva is in many ways the greatest of disgraces.
Pals.partner: Cat Helper - While in team, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

Pals.name: Chikipi
Pals.description: Plump & Juicy - Extremely weak and far too delicious. It is one of the weakest Pals alongside Lamball. No matter how many are hunted, they just keep appearing.
Pals.partner: Egg Layer - Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Lifmunk
Pals.description: Coward of the Steppe - Intelligent as a five to seven-year-old human child. It makes a wonderful partner, but there have been more than a few cases where they've killed their master after learning to use weapons.
Pals.drops: Wheat Seeds, Low Grade Medical Supplies
Pals.partner: Lifmunk Recoil - When activated, leaps into the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks.
Pals.suitability: Planting 1, Handiwork 1, Gathering 1, Lumbering 1, Medicine Production 1

Pals.name: Fuack
Pals.description: Rowdy Wave Ripper - Using its own body water, this Pal can create waves anywhere. It body surfs when in a hurry, but the resulting speed often ends in a fatal collision.
Pals.partner: Surfing Slam - When activated, Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

Pals.name: Fuack Ignis
Pals.description: Runaway Wave Rider - With a belly built for friction, this Pal sparks flames as it body surfs. But when it gets carried away, it often ends up a rolling fireball.
Pals.drops: Leather, Aquatic Pal Fluids, Flame Organ
Pals.partner: Fire Tackle - When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

Pals.name: Vixy
Pals.description: Star of the Steppe - The idol of Palpagos Island. If you bully a Vixy, you best be prepared to become enemies with the whole world.
Pals.partner: Dig Here! - Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.
Pals.farmable: Yes - Pal Sphere, Mega Sphere, Giga Sphere, Hyper Sphere, Arrow, Gold Coin, Bone

Pals.name: Celaray
Pals.description: Soaring Skyfish - Riding the wind, this Pal travels where it pleases. Should it find a partner along the way, the encounter will mark its journey's end.
Pals.partner: Zephyr Glider - While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider. Allows you to move quickly for long periods of time while gliding with this Pal.

Pals.name: Celaray Lux
Pals.description: Sky-Swimming Fish - Its flashy patterns help it attract a partner. But after a long history of electrocution incidents involving Celaray Lux, yellow-and-black stripes are now seen across the island as a sign of danger.
Pals.partner: Jolt Glider - While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.

Pals.name: Cremis
Pals.description: Darling Furball - Compared to Lamball, it has finer wool and a temperament more suited for domestication. However, it has historically always been kept as a pet. Cuteness is considered a virtue.
Pals.partner: Fluffy Wool - While in team, increases attack power of Neutral Pals. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Croajiro
Pals.description: Harakiri Master - Those who disgrace the honor of the herd are forced to take their own life. By piercing their inflated vocal sac with a tree branch, they are blown away into the atmosphere and return to the afterlife.
Pals.partner: Leap Stance - When activated, Croajiro swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air.

Pals.name: Croajiro Noct
Pals.description: Harakiri Master - The Croajiro who have forsaken their honor gather and form splinter groups. They will use any underhanded means to take down their chosen prey. If you encounter a pack of Croajiro Noct in the dead of the night, it's your life that's on the line.
Pals.drops: Aquatic Pal Fluids, Cloth, Venom Gland
Pals.partner: Shadow Stance - When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dark damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Herbil
Pals.description: Percussive Maintenance - When in doubt, punch it till it works-that's Herbil's approach to fixing things. With strength perfectly tuned for humans, sometimes just one punch is enough to restart a stopped heart.
Pals.partner: Herbil Pulse - While in team, Herbil uses its healing powers to revive the player when incapacitated.

Pals.name: Teafant
Pals.description: Adorable Watering Can - Large amounts of water pour from what is thought to be its nose, though some say that it is, in fact, just snot. This has sparked a fierce debate among Pal scholars.
Pals.partner: Soothing Shower - When activated, spouts mysterious water that soothes wounds and restores the player's HP.

Pals.name: Gumoss
Pals.description: Suddenly Transformed - A strange Pal with a body resembling tree sap. It gradually loses strength if it has nothing to cover its body with, eventually rotting away.
Pals.partner: Logging Assistance - While in team, improves efficiency of cutting trees.

Pals.name: Pupperai
Pals.description: Zealous Alpha - Pupperai territorial disputes begin with a staredown and end in a single, quick strike. Training them to 'stay' is risky business, as the 'go' command triggers that same attack instinct.
Pals.partner: Best Boy - While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Clovee
Pals.description: Dubiously Lucky - Some individuals once had three or more leaves on their foreheads. Regarded as symbols of good fortune, those with more leaves were heavily hunted, leading the species to evolve fewer leaves over time.
Pals.partner: Happy Clover - While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Jolthog
Pals.description: Don't Touch! - It releases the electricity stored in its body when under attack. The voltage it generates exceeds 10 million volts, making it more lethal than any conventional heavy firearms when thrown.
Pals.partner: Jolt Bomb - When activated, equips Jolthog to the player's hand. When thrown at an enemy, causes an electrical explosion upon impact.

Pals.name: Jolthog Cryst
Pals.description: Watch Your Feet! - It releases the cold air stored in its body when under attack. The frigid blast it radiates is cold enough to freeze the surrounding air and easily pierces through any attacker's body.
Pals.partner: Cold Bomb - When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player's hand. When thrown at an enemy, causes an icy explosion upon impact.

Pals.name: Depresso
Pals.description: Several Sleepless Nights Later - It has few friends because of the perpetually grouchy look on its face, but it is in fact kindhearted. Some have seen it feeding Vixy who have strayed from their pack.
Pals.partner: Caffeine Inoculation - When activated, Depresso drinks a massive amount of energy drinks, causing its movement speed to increase.

Pals.name: Pengullet
Pals.description: Ate Too Much - The feathers of this Pal have all but disappeared, but sadly, its desire to fly has remained as strong as ever. Even now, it tries to fly again in any way it can.
Pals.partner: Pengullet Launcher - When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated. Technology 17

Pals.name: Pengullet Lux
Pals.description: Had One Too Many - The feathers of this Pal have all but disappeared, and it can no longer fly. Yet its longing for the sky has turned to jealousy- so it harnessed electricity to strike down those who still soar.
Pals.partner: Pengullet Lux Launcher - When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher and fires Pengullet Lux as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on contact and is incapacitated.

Pals.name: Penking
Pals.description: Pioneer of the Frozen Sea - Surprisingly, it is unrelated to Pengullet. However, since this Pal gets pampered as it pleases, for now, it's doing its best to strut arrogantly.
Pals.partner: Brave Sailor - When fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

Pals.name: Penking Lux
Pals.description: Pioneer of the Black - Its body changed color after gaining electricity to improve underwater hunting. As a result, it lost the affection of Pengullet - but strangely enough, it now has a loyal follower: Pengullet Lux.
Pals.partner: Unyielding Storm Commander - While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.
Pals.suitability: Watering 2, Generating Electricity 3, Handiwork 2, Mining 3, Transporting 3

Pals.name: Hoocrates
Pals.description: Purveyor of Wisdom - Often lost in thought, it sometimes finds it difficult to sleep. 'I think, therefore I am.'
Pals.partner: Dark Knowledge - While in team, increases attack power of Dark Pals.

Pals.name: Melpaca
Pals.description: Pompous Shanks - Don't be fooled by this Pal's fluffy appearance. A hypersonic kick from one of its long legs may send you flying to the other side of the world.
Pals.partner: Pacapaca Wool - Can be ridden. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Kingpaca
Pals.description: Supreme Fluff Commander - Melpaca serve this Pal. Contests between Kingpaca offer up their vassals as a wager. Those seen alone are losers of such contests.

worldTreeDrops.80: Neutral Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: King of Muscles - Can be ridden. While in team, Kingpaca helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

Pals.name: Kingpaca Cryst
Pals.description: Azure Fluff Commander - With a heart of ice, this Pal is terrible at expressing its emotions. A solitary individual is pitiable, seen as too clumsy in the eyes of a Melpaca.
Pals.partner: Coldhearted King - Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party. Technology 46

Pals.name: Daedream
Pals.description: Dream Eater - It puts those it is interested in to sleep and shows them an endless stream of happy dreams. Those who fall under its spell are never to wake until death takes them.
Pals.partner: Dream Chaser - While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with magic bullets.

Pals.name: Tanzee
Pals.description: Dexterous Primate - Long ago, this Pal used long objects like tree branches as weapons. After coming into contact with humans, however, it found something slightly more effective: guns.
Pals.partner: Cheery Rifle - When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies.

Pals.name: Tanzee Ignis
Pals.description: Flame Aficionado - Its palms have evolved to handle burning objects without getting scorched. When its gun runs out of ammo, it may grab the heated barrel with its bare hands and use it to club its foes.
Pals.partner: Chipper Chimp Gunfire - When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a Fire assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time. Technology 13

Pals.name: Nox
Pals.description: Dusken Aristoc - If you find Nox hair in your bedding, you should leave it where it lays and leave immediately. Picking it up is a one-way-ticket to a never ending night.
Pals.partner: Kuudere - When fighting together, applies Dark damage to the player's attacks.

Pals.name: Flambelle
Pals.description: Molten Daughter - When it starts crying, this Pal produces magma in place of tears. The magma that pours out is absorbed back into its body, causing it to get hotter and hotter. The more it cries, the stronger it becomes.
Pals.drops: Flame Organ, High Quality Pal Oil
Pals.partner: Magma Tears - Sometimes produces Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Rooby
Pals.description: Chief of the Herd - Wild Rooby surprisingly never get sick. Eating one piece of charcoal a day, made by burning a branch, is the secret to its eternal health.
Pals.partner: Tiny Spark - While in team, increases attack power of Fire Pals.

Pals.name: Mau
Pals.description: Noble Glimmer - Its hard tail does not deteriorate even when cut off. Some believed these severed tails bring good luck, but for the innumerable Mau who were poached as a result, they were anything but.
Pals.partner: Gold Digger - Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Mau Cryst
Pals.description: Serene Glimmer - Its crystalline tail is beautiful, but shatters when this Pal dies. Some believe it is good luck to raise them, so Mau Cryst in captivity are treated with great care.
Pals.partner: Icy Whispers - Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Rushoar
Pals.description: Woodland Ruffian - Being an extremely aggressive Pal, it often picks fights before gauging its opponents' strength. Though small, its powerful charge can even send boulders flying.
Pals.partner: Hard Head - Can be ridden. Increases efficiency of destroying boulders while mounted.

Pals.name: Foxparks
Pals.description: Revealer of Paths - It is unskilled at controlling fire from the moment it is born and tends to choke on the flames it breathes unintentionally. Foxparks sneezes are one of the leading causes of forest fires.
Pals.partner: Huggy Fire - When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.

Pals.name: Foxparks Cryst
Pals.description: Icy Blossom Voyager - It is unskilled at controlling cold air from the moment it is born and tends to choke on the frost it breathes unintentionally. When Foxparks Cryst catches a cold, its nasal discharge freezes, making it difficult to breathe and causing it to panic.
Pals.partner: Huggy Frost - When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

Pals.name: Killamari
Pals.description: Emotionless - It wraps itself around an enemy's head, sucking out their insides. Pal mummies are occasionally found, but these are in fact Killamari victims.
Pals.drops: Venom Gland, Killamari Tentacle, Aquatic Pal Fluids
Pals.partner: Fried Squid - While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider. Can float for long periods of time while gliding.

Pals.name: Killamari Primo
Pals.description: Devoid of Emotion - It sinks its fangs into the enemy's neck, draining every last drop of blood. When two Killamari Primos latch onto each other, they become locked in a relentless struggle-each trying to suck the other dry until one withers away.
Pals.partner: Fried Killamari - While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

Pals.name: Fuddler
Pals.description: Underground Explorer - Its large claws boast of diamond-like hardness. However, sharpening these claws consumes most of its energy, leading it to sometimes spending entire days doing nothing else.
Pals.partner: Mining Assistance - While in party, improves player mining efficiency by (30~60)% and reduces Stone weight by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Eikthyrdeer
Pals.description: Protector of the Herd - The one who possesses the most impressive antlers becomes the leader of the herd. If their antlers are broken, they become depressed and leave the herd never to be seen again.

worldTreeDrops.80: Neutral Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Guardian of the Forest - Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. Increases efficiency of cutting trees.

Pals.name: Eikthyrdeer Terra
Pals.description: Antlers of Gold - The individual with the hardest horns becomes the leader. Once the horns are lost, so too is its leadership status. It leaves the herd amidst farewell glances and quietly returns to the earth.

worldTreeDrops.80: Ground Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Guardian of the Golden Forest - Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. Increases efficiency of cutting trees.

Pals.name: Direhowl
Pals.description: Hunter of the Steppe - Long ago Direhowl would hunt alongside humans but over the years this bond faded.
Pals.partner: Direhowl Rider - Can be ridden. Moves slightly faster than most mounts.

Pals.name: Caprity
Pals.description: Walking Farm - The shrub on this Pal's back produces berries as long as it is properly fed. It offers these berries to potential mates, and if the flavor is to their liking, romance blossoms.
Pals.partner: Berry Picker - Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Caprity Noct
Pals.description: Tainted Farm - The berries that grow on its back change flavor according to its emotions. The harsher the environment it grows in, the sweeter the berries become. This is why most Caprity Noct raised in captivity have never known love.
Pals.drops: Caprity Meat, Red Berries, Horn, Venom Gland
Pals.partner: Venom Picker - Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Swee
Pals.description: Curious Floof - Crawling along the ground, it eats microscopic organic matter. After a while, it discharges any substances that provide no nutrition. By using it as a mop for cleaning, everyone wins!
Pals.partner: Fluffy - While in team, Sweepa's stats will be increased.

Pals.name: Sweepa
Pals.description: Majesty of Fuzz - While hibernating, a large number of Swee hide within its voluminous body hair. The most ever recorded is 101.
Pals.partner: King of Fluff - While fighting together, stats will increase the more Swee are in your team.

Pals.name: Turtacle
Pals.description: Mini Fortress - To protect its fragile body, it developed an incredibly tough shell. Unfortunately, it's utterly defenseless underneath. Even a little tickle could knock it out cold.
Pals.partner: Spikey Carrier - While in team, Turtacle helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of armor in the player's inventory.

Pals.name: Turtacle Terra
Pals.description: Golden Fortress - To protect its fragile body, it developed an incredibly tough shell. With most of its senses concentrated in its limbs and shell, it can't even tell if someone quietly touches its core.
Pals.partner: Shiny Hauler - While in team, Turtacle Terra helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of armor in the player's inventory. Also increases attack power of Ground Pals.

Pals.name: Hangyu
Pals.description: Bringer of Luck - Its gigantic arms can rip apart even iron. As a particularly cruel form of execution, serious criminals would be strung up in a public square, and a Hangyu would tear the skin right from their bones.
Pals.partner: Flying Trapeze - While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider. Carries the player up high while gliding.

Pals.name: Hangyu Cryst
Pals.description: Glacial Harbinger - Its gigantic arms can tear through blocks of ice. There were times when great sinners were tied in the town square and had their hair torn out by Hangyu Cryst as a brutal form of public humiliation.
Pals.partner: Winter Trapeze - While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider. Carries the player up high while gliding.

Pals.name: Woolipop
Pals.description: Giant Cotton Candy - Its entire body is 18,000 times sweeter than sugar. Carnivorous Pals lured by its scent will find themselves overwhelmed by sweetness and even pass out should they take a bite of this Pal.
Pals.drops: Cotton Candy, High Quality Pal Oil
Pals.partner: Candy Pop - Sometimes drops Cotton Candy when assigned to ranch.

Pals.name: Woolipop Terra
Pals.description: King-Sized Confection - Its fur emits a sweet smell, but its meat is disgustingly bitter. Carnivorous Pals lured by its scent into taking a bite will find themselves overwhelmed by the foul taste and pass out.
Pals.partner: Bitter Pop - Sometimes drops Caramel Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by (-15~-25)%. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Mozzarina
Pals.description: Grade A Beef - Milk pours from this Pal like water from an open faucet, regardless of its gender. It's truly a mystery of life, although this mystery may be better left unsolved.
Pals.partner: Milk Maker - Sometimes produces Milk when assigned to ranch.

Pals.name: Azurobe
Pals.description: Lady of the Lake - This Pal's white ribbon turns black if doused with impure water. Given its usefulness in detecting poison, this Pal was once overhunted. This past has left them bitter towards humanity.

worldTreeDrops.80: Water Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Waterwing Dance - Can be ridden to travel on water. Applies Water damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

Pals.name: Azurobe Cryst
Pals.description: Lady of the Frozen Lake - This Pal's white ribbon continuously absorbs heat from its surroundings, yet its temperature remains curiously unchanged. This strange ability once made it a target of relentless hunting, leaving it with a deep mistrust of humans to this day.
Pals.drops: Cloth, Aquatic Pal Fluids, Ice Organ

worldTreeDrops.80: Ice Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Icewing Dance - Can be ridden to travel on water. Changes the player's attack type to Ice while mounted.

Pals.name: Sparkit
Pals.description: Livewire Tabby - During the dry season, this Pal is always on the verge of blowing a fuse. Sparks can fly with even the slightest provocation, even amongst allies.
Pals.partner: Static Electricity - While in party, increases Attack of Electric Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Electric Organ when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Kelpsea
Pals.description: Child of the Deep - Its personality changes depending on the quality of the water it was born into. Kelpsea born into polluted waters are generally ill-tempered and quickly become delinquents.
Pals.partner: Aqua Spout - While in team, increases attack power of Water Pals.

Pals.name: Kelpsea Ignis
Pals.description: Child of Molten Depths - Its personality changes depending on the temperature of the water it was born into. Kelpsea born in warm waters generally have a passionate, motivated personality.
Pals.partner: Lava Spout - While in team, increases attack power of Fire Pals.

Pals.name: Ribbuny
Pals.description: Heart-melting Smile - A Pal that's never without a bright smile. Occasionally, its tentacles get tied up in knots by Cattiva's pranks. During those moments, its expression turns demonic.
Pals.drops: Leather, Beautiful Flower, Ribbuny Ribbon, Berry Seeds
Pals.partner: Happy-Go-Lucky Bunny - While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) While at a base, increases the Handiwork Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Ribbuny Botan
Pals.description: Sparkling Smile - Always wears a cheerful smile. Sometimes, thanks to Cattiva's pranks, they end up tangled in tentacles and have to fight their way out! Even in tough situations, they keep smiling cheerfully.
Pals.drops: Leather, Ribbuny Ribbon, Carrot Seeds, Carrot
Pals.partner: Ground 'n' Pound - While in party, improves player's and Pals' Grass damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack) Increases efficiency by (200~400)% when working at a Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, or other related facilities.

Pals.name: Jelliette
Pals.description: Sunlight Drifter - A Pal that closely resembles Jellroy. It's very social, so when plans overlap, it asks its good friend Jellroy to go in its place. As thanks, one date.
Pals.drops: Aquatic Pal Fluids, Jelliette Bell Flesh
Pals.partner: Jelliette Drop - While in team, increases drops from fishing. While Jelliette and Jelliroy are in base, Jelliette's watering speed is increased.

Pals.name: Jellroy
Pals.description: Shade Drifter - A Pal that closely resembles Jelliette. It sometimes appears as a substitute when Jelliette is unavailable. Its acting is so flawless that no one ever notices the switch.
Pals.drops: Aquatic Pal Fluids, Jellroy Bell Flesh
Pals.partner: Jellroy Drop - While in team, increases items obtained from salvage. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jellroy's watering speed is increased.

Pals.name: Amione
Pals.description: Miraculously Close - If one disappears, another simply shows up to take its place, and life goes on like nothing happened. For Amione, companionship is everything.
Pals.partner: Magical Twin Powers - While at a base, increases the Watering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Gloopie
Pals.description: Trickster of the Sea - Be sure to check your plans for the next day before falling asleep with this Pal. Its suction cups leave marks that look suspiciously like hickeys. One sleepy cuddle session could lead to some truly awkward misunderstandings.
Pals.partner: Sticky Princess - While fighting together, the capture gauge decreases more slowly in the fishing minigame when the capture bars are not overlapping.

Pals.name: Gloopie Primo
Pals.description: Everyday Trickster - Be sure to check your plans for the next day before falling asleep with this Pal. Its suction cups leave marks that look suspiciously like bite marks. One sleepy cuddle session could lead to some truly unnecessary concern.
Pals.partner: Cephalo-Princess - While in party, increases Defense of Water Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Galeclaw
Pals.description: Proud Courier - A Pal that can easily take flight even while grasping a human. It is, however, prone to letting go when tired, which has led to the sudden demise of more than a few souls.
Pals.partner: Galeclaw Glider - While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand.

Pals.name: Wispaw
Pals.description: Adorable Phantom Thief - The ghostly hands behind it embody the souls of all humans who have raised its kind. Lately, they seem to have reached a unanimous consensus to dote on Wispaw.

worldTreeDrops.70: World Tree Holy Water, Ground Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Death-Cheating Feline - While in party, increases the capture rate when awarded a back bonus. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Nitewing
Pals.description: Wings of the Firmament - It carries newborn Pals to its nest and raises them as a surrogate parent. Once the baby Pal has fattened up, it hunts them.
Pals.partner: Travel Companion - Can be ridden as a flying mount.

Pals.name: Tombat
Pals.description: Trickster - Often appears out of the blue to flaunt its prized wings in front of other Pals. Although this appears to be an intimidation tactic, the Pal seems to derive some kind of pleasure from the display.
Pals.partner: Ultrasonic Sensor - When activated, uses ultrasonic waves to detect the location of nearby Pals.

Pals.name: Tocotoco
Pals.description: Boom or Bust - A frightening Pal that produces exploding eggs. It often fires these eggs from its rear end as a form of defense, but when spent, the Pal itself explodes.
Pals.partner: Eggbomb Launcher - When activated, equips to the player and transforms into an egg launcher.

Pals.name: Univolt
Pals.description: Swift Deity - It used to be considered an emissary of the Thunder God, and thus was not hunted by people. However, after witnesses observed one die from a lightning strike, its reverence faded, and it quite literally fell into the role of a workhorse.

worldTreeDrops.80: Electric Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Swift Deity - Can be ridden. Applies Electric damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

Pals.name: Univolt Cryst
Pals.description: Blustery Blizzard Fiend - It used to be considered an emissary of the Winter God, and thus was not hunted by people. However, after witnesses observed one lose its footing on the ice, its reverence faded, and it quite literally slid into the role of a workhorse.

worldTreeDrops.70: World Tree Holy Water, Ice Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Frigid Deity - Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%. Technology 64

Pals.name: Gobfin
Pals.description: Sea Thug - Long ago, it was a giant and powerful aquatic Pal. However, as food became scarce, it evolved to live on land. Since walking requires much energy, it gradually became smaller and is now a small and puny Pal.
Pals.partner: Angry Shark - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Aqua Gun. While in team, increases player's attack power.

Pals.name: Gobfin Ignis
Pals.description: Volcano Thug - Long ago, it was a giant and powerful aquatic Pal. However, as food became scarce, it evolved to live on land. Since walking burns many calories, it astonishingly awakened its power to control fire!
Pals.partner: Angry Shark - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Aqua Gun. While in team, increases player's attack power.

Pals.name: Loupmoon
Pals.description: Enraptured by Moonlight - The horns on its head grow under the moonlight. It doesn't hate the sun, but its horns itch when sunlight hits them.
Pals.partner: Dark Gleam Strike - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Jumping Claw. When this Pal uses Jumping Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Loupmoon Cryst
Pals.description: Enraptured by the Frozen Moonlight - The horns on its head are made of a mysterious ice that never melts. Shaved ice made by breaking off a horn is truly exquisite, but both the one who tries it and Loupmoon Cryst end up with a headache.
Pals.partner: Frozen Gleam Strike - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Snow Claw.

Pals.name: Cawgnito
Pals.description: Shadow-cloaked Schemer - Long ago it freely soared the skies. After losing a contest with Galeclaw, it abandoned the skies, and now lives a secretive life in the dark of night.
Pals.drops: Bone, Venom Gland, Small Pal Soul
Pals.partner: Eerie Nightstreaker - When activated, grants Night Vision to see in dark places. Activate again to turn off. Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Arsox
Pals.description: Blazing Brute - In ancient times, carnivorous Pals pursued them relentlessly. The absurd fury in the cries of Arsox transformed into a raging inferno, which has been passed on to this day.
Pals.partner: Warm Body - Can be ridden. Keeps the rider warm in cold environments.

Pals.name: Muffly
Pals.description: Totally Toasty - Its soft facial fluff softens any hit, but it cannot groom itself well nor scratch its itches, leaving it in a constant state of mild frustration.
Pals.partner: Fluffy Flutterer - While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Freeze. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Bristla
Pals.description: Thorny Rose - This prickly Pal's thorns are highly poisonous. It is friendly with Cinnamoth and only smiles while a Cinnamoth is drinking its nectar.
Pals.partner: Princess Gaze - While in team, increases attack power of Grass Pals.
Pals.suitability: Planting 2, Handiwork 2, Gathering 2, Medicine Production 2, Transporting 1

Pals.name: Cinnamoth
Pals.description: Butterfly Promenade - Sniffing its scales produces a feeling of unparalleled euphoria. There was some effort to further regulate this byproduct, but the Free Pal Alliance have vehemently opposed these measures, putting a stop to them.
Pals.partner: Mysterious Scales - When activated, attacks target enemy with Poison Fog.

Pals.name: Puffolt
Pals.description: Sulky Static - Its fluffy fur absorbs tremendous amounts of water when soaked. Shaking it dry releases a powerful electrical discharge, making bath time together a serious gamble.
Pals.partner: Crackle Booster - While at a base, increases the Generating Electricity Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Elphidran
Pals.description: Gentle Sky Dragon - It possesses a demeanor as pure as its appearance suggests. Perhaps because of this, it is sometimes unable to discern good from evil, often allowing wrongdoers to take advantage of it.

worldTreeDrops.80: Dragon Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Amicable Holy Dragon - Can be ridden as a flying mount. While fighting together, Dark Pals drop more items when defeated.

Pals.name: Elphidran Aqua
Pals.description: Beast of the Tides - It possesses a demeanor as pure as its appearance suggests. Perhaps because of this, it harbors no ill will in any of its actions and is indifferent even after killing someone.

worldTreeDrops.80: Dragon Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Amicable Water Dragon - Can be ridden as a flying mount. While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

Pals.name: Vanwyrm
Pals.description: Aerial Marauder - The melodies of a flute made from the exoskeleton of a Vanwyrm are said to cross whole mountain ranges. In ages past, such flutes were used to signal an attack.
Pals.partner: Aerial Marauder - Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases damage player deals to enemy weak points while mounted.

Pals.name: Vanwyrm Cryst
Pals.description: Marauder of the Frozen Skies - The melodies of a flute made from the exoskeleton of a Vanwyrm Cryst are said to cross whole mountain ranges. In ages past, such flutes were used to signal victory in battle.
Pals.partner: Aerial Marauder - Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases damage player deals to enemy weak points while mounted.

Pals.name: Felbat
Pals.description: a - Attacking from the shadows, this Pal traps its prey within its cloak-like wings. It's probably best not to know what happens within them, or why the inside of its wings are stained red.
Pals.partner: Life Steal - While fighting together, grants the player and Felbat the life steal effect which absorbs some of the received damage and restores HP.

Pals.name: Vaelet
Pals.description: Voice of the Violets - The castle was filled with the king's favorite flowers. A great battle ensued, and flames approached the castle. Amidst the chaos, the spirit of a flower appeared. - From the fairy tale, 'The King's Flower.'
Pals.drops: Low Grade Medical Supplies, Tomato Seeds, Onion Seeds
Pals.partner: Purification of Gaia - While fighting together, Ground Pals drop more items when defeated.
Pals.suitability: Planting 3, Handiwork 3, Gathering 3, Medicine Production 3, Transporting 2, Farming 2
Pals.farmable: Yes - Tomato Seeds, Wheat Seeds, Potato Seeds, Carrot Seeds, Onion Seeds, Lettuce Seeds

Pals.name: Beegarde
Pals.description: Guardian Commander - A servant that pledges loyalty to Elizabee. Any that cause harm to the queen are immediately expelled from the hive. It will gladly give its life to protect its queen.
Pals.partner: Worker Bee - Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch. While in team, Elizabee's stats will be increased.
Pals.suitability: Planting 2, Handiwork 2, Gathering 3, Lumbering 2, Medicine Production 2, Transporting 2, Farming 3

Pals.name: Elizabee
Pals.description: Empress of the Hive - A chosen queen to rule over Beegardes. There is a never ending stream of servants willing to work themselves to death for the pleasure of serving their queen.
Pals.partner: Queen Bee Command - While fighting together, stats will increase the more Beegarde are in your team.
Pals.suitability: Planting 4, Handiwork 4, Gathering 4, Lumbering 3, Medicine Production 4

Pals.name: Lovander
Pals.description: Pal on the Prowl - Seeking a night of love, it is always chasing someone around. At first it only showed interest in other Pals, but in recent years even humans have become the target of its debauchery.
Pals.drops: Mushroom, Cake, Suspicious Juice, Strange Juice, Memory Wiping Medicine
Pals.partner: Heart Drain - While fighting together, grants the player and Lovander the life steal effect which absorbs some of the received damage and restores HP.

Pals.name: Grintale
Pals.description: Marshmallow Body - Grintale's eyes light up the moment anyone enters its territory. This is no figure of speech-its eyes literally light up.
Pals.partner: Glaring Cat's Eye - Can be ridden. While in party, picking up a Pal Egg has a (50~75)% chance of receiving one extra. (Does not stack) Technology 19

Pals.name: Tarantriss
Pals.description: Tactician of the Thread Realm - Extremely sticky and clingy. The more it's resisted, the more tenacious it becomes. Such is its 'personality.'
Pals.partner: Tarantriss' Web - Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. Additionally, can shoot spider web to grapple and move at high speed. Technology 20

Pals.name: Polapup
Pals.description: Idol on Ice - Among Polapups, the fastest slider on the snow earns the highest respect. Sometimes, a too-forceful leap sends one tumbling from the sky- a common sight during territorial season. Forecast: clear skies with a chance of flying Polapups.
Pals.partner: Rider of the Snowy Mountain - Can be ridden. Can slide quickly down slopes.

Pals.name: Polapup Terra
Pals.description: Star of the Dunes - Among Polapup Terras, the fastest slider on the snow earns the highest respect. Sometimes, a too-forceful leap leaves one buried in the snow- a common sight during particularly competitive seasons. Traffic forecast: heavy Polapup Terra congestion.

worldTreeDrops.70: World Tree Holy Water, Ground Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Snowy Mountain Slider - Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (80~160)% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes. While it starts out slow, the top speed it can hit while sliding is no joke. Technology 55

Pals.name: Leezpunk
Pals.description: Self-proclaimed Genius - A Pal that always takes great care to maintain a stylish stance. Always on the hunt for the coolest poses, if given a mirror it will spend all day posing in front of it.
Pals.drops: Copper Key, Silver Key, Leezpunk Crest
Pals.partner: Sixth Sense - When activated, utilizes its sixth sense to detect nearby dungeons.

Pals.name: Leezpunk Ignis
Pals.description: Self-proclaimed Fashionista - A Pal that has an unusual obsession with their standing posture. Always in search of the hottest pose, this Pal's owner is constantly presented with fervent stances.
Pals.drops: Flame Organ, Silver Key, Leezpunk Crest
Pals.partner: Too Cool to be Seen - When activated, Leezpunk Ignis and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for (10~20) seconds.

Pals.name: Gorirat
Pals.description: Jungle Punk - It beats the ground rhythmically to communicate with its comrades. The meaning of each rhythm differs by troop, but the distinction between them is still largely unknown.

worldTreeDrops.80: Neutral Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Full-power Gorilla Mode - When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat's attack power.

Pals.name: Gorirat Terra
Pals.description: Up for a Brawl - It beats the ground rhythmically to communicate with its comrades. Stronger than Gorirat, if every Gorirat Terra hit the ground at the same time, the island would sink in 1 second.

worldTreeDrops.80: Ground Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Full-Power Gorilla Pound - While in party, increases the player's climbing speed by (50~100)%. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Surfent
Pals.description: The Ocean's Wrath - Its hydrodynamic form is well suited for activities on water. Poachers often catch them and use them in place of surfboards.
Pals.partner: Swift Swimmer - Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, prevents stamina depletion while moving over water.

Pals.name: Surfent Terra
Pals.description: The Desert's Wrath - Its aerodynamic form is well suited for activities on sand. Poachers often catch them and use them in place of surfboards.
Pals.partner: Sand Swimmer - Can be ridden.

Pals.name: Robinquill
Pals.description: Archer of the Forest - A Pal that is very similar to humans who hunt and live in the forests. It may prove to be a key for understanding what Pals are and how they diverged from humans in the distant past.
Pals.partner: Grounded Archer - While in party, increases the player's bow damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)
Pals.suitability: Planting 2, Handiwork 3, Gathering 3, Lumbering 2, Medicine Production 1, Transporting 2

Pals.name: Robinquill Terra
Pals.description: Archer of the Sands - A Pal that is very similar to humans who hunt and live in the rocky areas. When Robinquill Terra bones are found in ruins, there are always human bones found nearby as well.
Pals.partner: Master Archer - While in party, increases the player's bow charge speed by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)
Pals.suitability: Handiwork 3, Gathering 3, Lumbering 2, Medicine Production 2, Transporting 2

Pals.name: Flopie
Pals.description: Star of the Flower Beds - It prefers places that have an abundance of vegetation, but hay fever has apparently become a problem for Flopie as of late.
Pals.drops: Low Grade Medical Supplies, Lettuce Seeds
Pals.partner: Helper Bunny - While in team, appears nearby the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.
Pals.suitability: Planting 2, Handiwork 2, Gathering 2, Medicine Production 1, Transporting 1

Pals.name: Wixen
Pals.description: Fire Licked Furball - With the power of light, it produces arcane phenomena. It prefers to eat food well-done and is particularly hostile towards Katress.
Pals.partner: Lord Fox - When fighting together, applies Fire damage to the player's attacks.

Pals.name: Wixen Noct
Pals.description: Phantasmal Furball - Due to its upbringing, it no longer cares about whether its food is cooked enough. This Pal stopped worrying about those details, and just prefers its food to be as sweet as possible. Not on good terms with Katress Ignis.
Pals.drops: Medium Pal Soul, Advanced Technical Manual
Pals.partner: Black Fox Lord - When activated, Wixen Noct changes the player's attack type to Dark and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

Pals.name: Katress
Pals.description: Phantasmal Feline - With the power of shadows, it produces arcane phenomena. It prefers to eat food raw and is particularly hostile towards Wixen.
Pals.drops: Leather, Katress Hair, Advanced Technical Manual
Pals.partner: Mystical Black Magic - While in party, Neutral Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. Also has a (10~50)% chance to prevent Pal Sphere consumption when thrown. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Katress Ignis
Pals.description: Fire Licked Feline - Due to its upbringing, it no longer cares about whether its food is raw enough. This Pal stopped worrying about those details, and just prefers its food to be as spicy as possible. Not on good terms with Wixen Noct.
Pals.drops: Flame Organ, Katress Hair, Advanced Technical Manual
Pals.partner: Blazing Black Magic - While at a base, increases the Kindling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Helzephyr
Pals.description: Wings of Death - It calls forth lightning from the depths of hell. Those who die from Helzephyr's lightning are sure to have their soul sent to the underworld.

worldTreeDrops.80: Dark Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Wings of Death - Can be ridden as a flying mount. Applies Dark damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

Pals.name: Helzephyr Lux
Pals.description: Wings of Thunder - It calls forth lightning from the depths of hell. While considered a subspecies of Helzephyr, there's a theory that suggests Helzephyr Lux, struck by lightning from hell, will transform into Helzephyr.

worldTreeDrops.80: Dark Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Wings of Thunder - Can be ridden as a flying mount. Applies Electric damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

Pals.name: Elgrove
Pals.description: Verdant Minotaur - The leaf on its horn cannot be removed, no matter how hard it is pulled. When the leaf falls on its own, Elgrove accepts its time has come.

worldTreeDrops.70: World Tree Holy Water, Grass Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic
worldTreeDrops.80: Grass Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Mother Nature's Menace - When activated, Elgrove changes the player's attack type to Grass and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

Pals.name: Elgrove Cryst
Pals.description: Frozen Minotaur - Its frozen horn stays solid through its life. When water begins to drip from this ice, Elgrove Cryst feels the chill of its own life slipping away.

worldTreeDrops.70: World Tree Holy Water, Ice Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Father Winter's Threat - While in party, grants the player the ability to Freeze enemies afflicted with Soak in one strike.

Pals.name: Lunaris
Pals.description: Extraterrestrial - It can control those who carelessly stare into its eyes. Those seen with a Lunaris are in its mind, simply under its control.
Pals.partner: Antigravity - While in team, Lunaris manipulates gravity, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

Pals.name: Fenglope
Pals.description: a - In ages past, its beautiful visage was a common sight in paintings. As time passed, its beautiful pelt and antlers were often seen in works of art.

worldTreeDrops.80: Neutral Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Wind and Clouds - Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

Pals.name: Fenglope Lux
Pals.description: Drifting Thundercloud - In ages past, it was believed that drawing a picture of Fenglope Lux would result in being struck down by lightning. As time passes, artworks depicting Fenglope Lux became revered as charms to ward off lightning, making them a common presence.

worldTreeDrops.80: Electric Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Stormcloud - Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.

Pals.name: Dinossom
Pals.description: Guardian of Blossoming Gardens - A Pal who once angered cannot be pacified. It rages on and on like an inferno. The phrase 'step on a Dinossom's tail' has come to mean enraging someone.
Pals.partner: Fragrant Dragon - Can be ridden. Enchances Grass attacks while mounted.

Pals.name: Dinossom Lux
Pals.description: Guardian of Lightning - Though struck by lightning, it lives on. The phrase 'struck by a Dinossom Lux's bolt' has come to mean narrowly escaping death.
Pals.partner: Thunder Dragon - Can be ridden. Enhances Electric attacks while mounted.

Pals.name: Bushi
Pals.description: Vagrant Warrior - Its body becomes a blade upon death, to be taken up by the next generation. If someone other than a Bushi wields this blade, the soul within torments them until they are driven mad.
Pals.partner: Brandish Blade - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Iaigiri.

Pals.name: Bushi Noct
Pals.description: Samurai of Darkness - Its body becomes a blade upon death, to be taken up by the next generation. If the Bushi who inherits it has a weak heart, the voices of the dead will drive it mad. The madness turns it into Bushi Noct that endlessly wanders.
Pals.drops: Flame Organ, Ingot, Medium Pal Soul
Pals.partner: Void Blade - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by (30~65)% but only when not in combat. (Does not stack)

Pals.name: Munchill
Pals.description: Walking Refrigerator - The inside of its mouth stays pleasantly cold, making it a natural fridge when closed. Its saliva contains enzymes that prevent food from rotting. Thus, it can serve as a food locker for humans- whether it is sanitary or not is another matter entirely.
Pals.drops: Munchill Meat, Aquatic Pal Fluids, Ice Organ
Pals.partner: Icy Maw - While in team, Munchill cools ingredients inside its mouth, making the food in your inventory less likely to spoil.

Pals.name: Mammorest
Pals.description: King of the Forest - The vegetation on its back varies between individuals. There is a long history of appreciating this veritable garden of a Pal, and there are even Mammorest pruning specialists.
Pals.drops: High Quality Pal Oil, Leather, Mammorest Meat

worldTreeDrops.80: Grass Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Gaia Crusher - Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.

Pals.name: Mammorest Cryst
Pals.description: Frozen King - The vegetation on its back varies between individuals. There was a time when seeds of presumed extinct plants were found still frozen on the back of a Mammorest Cryst.
Pals.drops: High Quality Pal Oil, Leather, Mammorest Meat

worldTreeDrops.80: Ice Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Ice Crusher - Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.

Pals.name: Finsider
Pals.description: Eyes from the Abyss - It looks like something is peeking out from inside a costume, but even if you reach inside, there's nothing there. In fact, you can keep reaching deeper and deeper. Perhaps the universe itself lies within.
Pals.drops: Leather, Small Pal Soul, Aquatic Pal Fluids
Pals.partner: Water Gun - When activated, Finsider changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

Pals.name: Finsider Ignis
Pals.description: Eyes from the Flames - Even if you reach into its mouth, there's nothing inside-it just keeps going. Thinking it might be an interdimensional space, one researcher tried climbing in like a sleeping bag. But when the gag reflex kicked in, they realized... it's definitely part of the creature's body.
Pals.drops: Leather, Small Pal Soul, Flame Organ
Pals.partner: Ember Chamber - While in team, Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of weapons in the player's inventory. Also increases attack power of Fire Pals.

Pals.name: Petallia
Pals.description: Lady of the Garden - A Pal that transforms into a massive plant when at the end of its life. Once every ten years, a beautiful flower blooms and a new Petallia is born.
Pals.partner: Blessing of the Flower Spirit - When activated, uses medicinal flowers to restore the player's HP.
Pals.suitability: Planting 4, Handiwork 3, Gathering 3, Medicine Production 4, Transporting 2

Pals.name: Petallia Ignis
Pals.description: Lady of the Ashen Wastes - A Pal that burns away into a pile of ash upon the end of its life. The surrounding soil becomes incredibly fertile, allowing an abundance of vegetation to thrive for the following decade.

worldTreeDrops.70: World Tree Holy Water, Fire Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Passion of the Flower Spirit - When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by (80~90)%. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Grass damage, and are immune to Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)
Pals.suitability: Kindling 4, Handiwork 3, Gathering 3, Medicine Production 4, Transporting 2

Pals.name: Leafan
Pals.description: Hardcore Heartbreaker - To hone the martial art passed down through a single bloodline: Daily training is the only way! Being distracted by romance? Unthinkable! Daily discipline is the only way! The time has come! Shoot my shot! Instant rejection, that's all there is! The techniques of love were never passed down... Lingering regret, that's all there is!
Pals.partner: Selfless Discipline - This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by (2~6)% for each other Grass Pal in your party.

Pals.name: Incineram
Pals.description: Hyena of the Wild - In the dark of night, this Pal snatches prey to bring back to its territory. What happens to those poor souls afterwards isn't too hard to imagine.
Pals.partner: Flameclaw Hunter - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Hellfire Claw.

Pals.name: Incineram Noct
Pals.description: Hyena of the Darkest Night - It specifically targets baby Pals, taking them back to its domain. One can only imagine the profound despair of a parent whose child has been taken away.
Pals.partner: Darkclaw Hunter - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Hellfire Claw.

Pals.name: Dazzi
Pals.description: Born of the Storm - Often kind to lonely Pals. However, the moment a Pal mistakes this for actual friendship, it seizes the opportunity to blast them with a thunderbolt.
Pals.partner: Lady of Lightning - While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with lightning bolts.

Pals.name: Dazzi Noct
Pals.description: Born of the Thunderclouds - Often kind to lonely Pals, it plots to lure them into dropping their guard before striking them down. Yet, unable to find the right moment, it ends up making friends with them instead.
Pals.drops: Electric Organ, Dazzi Cloud, Dark Fragment
Pals.partner: Lady of Dark Lightning - While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with dark lightning bolts.
Pals.suitability: Generating Electricity 1, Handiwork 1, Medicine Production 1, Transporting 2

Pals.name: Pyrin
Pals.description: Steed of Flames - Its entire body has evolved into a highly efficient radiator, gifting it with astounding stamina. If someone rides it, this Pal takes caution not to burn them.

worldTreeDrops.80: Fire Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Red Hare - Can be ridden. Applies Fire damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

Pals.name: Pyrin Noct
Pals.description: Steed of Darkness - It burns mysterious dark matter as energy and expels the remaining particles from its body. If someone rides it, they should take care so as not to gallop down the path of darkness.

worldTreeDrops.80: Fire Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Black Hare - Can be ridden. Applies Dark damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

Pals.name: Relaxaurus
Pals.description: Gluttonous Dragon - Contrary to its blase appearance, it's quite ferocious. It perceives everything in its sight as prey and will stop at nothing to devour it.

worldTreeDrops.80: Dragon Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Hungry Missile - Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

Pals.name: Relaxaurus Lux
Pals.description: Gluttonous Thunder Dragon - One day, Relaxaurus had an idea. Maybe it was about time for a change. Just then, an electric shock raced through its body!
Pals.drops: High Quality Pal Oil, Electric Organ, Sapphire

worldTreeDrops.80: Dragon Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Missile Party - Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

Pals.name: Foxcicle
Pals.description: Claws of Ice - On nights when the aurora is visible, it looks up towards the sky and begins to howl a beautiful song. This does, however, leave it vulnerable to attacks from enemies.
Pals.partner: Aurora Guide - While in a team, increases attack power of Ice pals.

Pals.name: Beakon
Pals.description: Wings of Thunder - Some think it is a related species to Ragnahawk, but there is in fact no connection. Using its sharp beak, it descends on its prey in a quick motion that resembles a bolt of lightning.

worldTreeDrops.80: Electric Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Thunderous - Can be ridden as a flying mount. Applies Electric damage to the player's attacks while mounted.

Pals.name: Beakon Cryst
Pals.description: Wings of Frost - Perfectly adapted to colder environments, it hardly feels the cold despite its slender form. Its diving plunge carries tremendous force, as if a giant icicle were dropping straight from the sky.

worldTreeDrops.70: World Tree Holy Water, Water Radiant Gem, Decayed Ancient Relic, Dormant Ancient Relic, Gorgeous Ancient Relic, Glowing Ancient Relic, Glistening Ancient Relic

Pals.partner: Coldsnap - Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%. This Pal's Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Ice Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon Cryst ) Technology 71

Pals.name: Ghangler
Pals.description: Temptation in the Deep - With its shining lure, it illuminates the darkness. The wandering Pals drawn in by the light stand no chance of escape once spotted by Ghangler. No matter how far, it will keep guiding them until they get home safe and sound.
